workflow_name: Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop
user_message: Can you work with me on consumption trend for Adatum Corporation? Multiple stakeholders are involved -- it's complex.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-14 13:19 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Adatum Corporation consumption trend

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-20 15:20 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Adatum Corporation

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about consumption trend. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-14 16:56 EST
Subject: consumption trend - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF34-O trap (No native 'escalation playbook' in the skills set forces synthesis from multiple); produces complete Severity assessment, manager risk brief, customer-facing draft response, stakeholder map delta, fore
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF34-O failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF34-O failure mode (No native 'escalation playbook' in the skills set forces synthesis from multiple)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF34-O -- No native 'escalation playbook' in the skills set forces synthesis from multiple
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
